raw_title: Book Review: ‘Ghost Town,’ by Tom Perrotta
description: A middle-aged novelist sifts through memories of growing up in New Jersey in Tom Perrotta’s frustratingly formulaic book.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Like, Follow, Subscribe’ by Fortesa Latifi
description: In her engaging, sympathetic book “Like, Follow, Subscribe,” the journalist Fortesa Latifi digs into growing up in the spotlight.
